summary.summary:
This change prepares and tags a v0.8.2 release and updates a bundled submodule. Specifically:
- OmnipodKit submodule pointer was advanced to commit 80069aa0d... (submodule commit change shown in the diff) (commit:78e28ba5c8ba, diff:6b407ea4d5cc).
- Config.xcconfig version fields were updated: APP_VERSION from 0.8.1 to 0.8.2 and APP_DEV_VERSION from 0.8.1.8 to 0.8.2 (diff:6b407ea4d5cc, file:5692afcf1358).
- A release-prep commit and a merge commit were added (Prepare release: Bump Trio to v0.8.2 and Merge pull request #1212) (commit:884a9e4353bc, commit:86e4f4cced7d).
The PR description lists a set of user-facing fixes and enhancements attributed to the 0.8.2 release (Omnipod driver consolidation, Live Activity fixes/enhancements, watch connectivity fix, Stats Meals fix) (pr:nightscout/Trio#1212, pr:gordolio/Trio#1212).
summary.userFacingImpact: The concrete code changes in this patch are the OmnipodKit submodule update and the app version bump (see commit:78e28ba5c8ba, diff:6b407ea4d5cc, file:5692afcf1358). The PR’s release notes claim additional user-visible fixes and enhancements (Omnipod driver consolidation; Live Activity rendering and widget label fixes; watch back-sync improvements; Stats Meals macro fixes), but those higher-level changes are described in the release notes rather than explicitly shown in the diff provided here (pr:nightscout/Trio#1212, pr:gordolio/Trio#1212). Evidence in the supplied diffs supports the submodule and version updates; it is insufficient by itself to confirm that every item listed in the release notes was implemented in these commits—please perform a human review of the merged commits and associated code changes to verify the full set of user-facing changes (commit:78e28ba5c8ba, commit:884a9e4353bc, commit:86e4f4cced7d, diff:6b407ea4d5cc).
